case_title: P W FU VS. CAPTAIN IDETA

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IS DENIED. OBJECTION IS NOTED. REHEARING ON P W FU'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES AND COSTS IS HELD. THE RULING ON THE APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES AND COSTS REMAINS AS IS. NO FUTURE REQUESTS FOR FEE WAIVER SHALL BE GRANTED AT THE FILING COUNTER. ORDER SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2012 FOR 10:00AM IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT. JUDGE MITCHELL HAS RECUSED HIMSELF IN THIS CASE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2012 - CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR ASSIGNMENT OF BENCH OFFICER. (206)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON COURT'S MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-16-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER RECONSIDERATION HEARING
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR. CLERK: L. FONG. NOT REPORTED. (624)
TO DISMISS FRIVOLOUS PREFILING ORDER FOR UNSUBSTANTIATED ACCUSATION OF VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND NONSENSICAL FEE WAIVER RECONSIDERATIONS IMMEDIATELY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) SC-100 AND POS-10 BLANK FORMS. PAID BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF P W FU A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT WAS HEARD. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND ATTORNEY KEVIN MACLAUGHLIN FOR DEFENDANT(S) IN VARIOUS CASES WHERE MS. FU IS THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING WAS DENIED. OBJECTION WAS NOTED. MOTION WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED MS. FU DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CCP 391(B)(3). ANY NEW CLAIM FILED BY MS. FU IN THE FUTURE SHALL REQUIRE A PRE-FILING ORDER FROM THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SEVERAL VARIATIONS OF HER NAME AS FOLLOWS: P.W. FU, PO WAN FU, BO WAN FU. THE COURT INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO UPDATE THE COURT'S RECORD WITH HER MOST RECENT ADDRESS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO PLAINTIFF: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER. RETURN TO SENDER NO LONGER HERE.
DECLARATION OF P W FU FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
